sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking red blocks in order: top, middle, bottom
# Then repeat the sequence a few times

for cycle in range(5):
    for row, col in [(17, 20), (26, 14), (35, 14)]:
        action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': row, 'col': col}])
        if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
            print(f"Level completed at cycle {cycle}, ({row},{col})!")
            break
        if last_action_result.get('game_over'):
            print(f"Game over at cycle {cycle}, ({row},{col})")
            break
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('game_over'):
        break
else:
    print("No completion after 5 cycles of red blocks")
    
    # Try clicking green blocks in order: top, middle, bottom
    for cycle in range(5):
        for row, col in [(17, 39), (26, 48), (35, 48)]:
            action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': row, 'col': col}])
            if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
                print(f"Level completed at cycle {cycle}, ({row},{col})!")
                break
            if last_action_result.get('game_over'):
                print(f"Game over at cycle {cycle}, ({row},{col})")
                break
        if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('game_over'):
            break
    else:
        print("No completion after 5 cycles of green blocks")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
